expectations.text: Filters to promoters (score 9-10) with pricing theme
expectations.evidence: Explicitly filters for scores 9-10 with nps_reason_primary in [Affordable, Expensive, 28-Day Plan Issue]. All verbatims show NPS 9 or 10.
30+ verbatims organized into 6 thematic clusters: Budget-Friendly, Quality+Low Price, Zero Installation Cost, Value for Money, Middle-Class Accessibility, Better Than Competitors
Hindi/Hinglish verbatims preserved in original form with English translations. Mix of romanized Hindi and Devanagari script maintained.
Data Quality Notes: '48+ across all sprints', broken down by reason type (Affordable ~35, 28-Day ~3, Expensive ~5). 17 sprints analyzed.

notes: Rich qualitative analysis. Goes beyond listing verbatims to identify sub-themes within pricing perception. Nuanced treatment of 28-day billing mentions by promoters and 'expensive' secondary reasons. Methodology section properly documents evocativeness scoring.
